title: pteryxia terebinthina var. californica
intro: Pteryxia terebinthina var. californica, also known as California lomatium, is a perennial plant native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's roots and leaves contain compounds that help to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe the throat, offering various health benefits. Californica lomatium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate respiratory discomfort.
